scripts.dev: npm --workspace @retrodex/api run dev & npm --workspace @retrodex/web run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace @retrodex/contracts run build && npm --workspace @retrodex/api run build && npm --workspace @retrodex/cli run build && npm --workspace @retrodex/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @retrodex/contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace @retrodex/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @retrodex/cli run typecheck && npm --workspace @retrodex/web run typecheck
